Our Story

Straight from the Heart of Zambia

Zambia is one of the world's most important gemstone sources — home to world-class amethysts, aquamarines, emeralds, and citrines. We operate directly from Lusaka, sourcing raw and cut stones from local miners and cutting houses.

01

Raw & Ready to Sell

Our stones come directly from Zambian sources — freshly cut, sorted, and weighed. No layers of markup. You deal directly with us.

02

Flexible for All Buyers

Whether you need a single premium stone or a bulk parcel of hundreds of carats, we accommodate orders of all sizes for retailers and manufacturers alike.

03

Verified & Documented

All parcels are weighed on calibrated gem scales and documented with photos. What you see is exactly what you receive.

7+
Gem varieties
472+
Carats in stock
100%
Zambian origin
Direct
No middlemen

Every stone is personally sourced, photographed, and verified before being offered for sale. We update our inventory regularly as new parcels arrive from the field.

Enquire About Stock
Why Buy From Us

The Zambian Advantage

Zambia produces some of the world's finest colored stones. Buying direct means better pricing, traceability, and first access to new arrivals.

✦

Competitive Wholesale Pricing

Direct sourcing eliminates markup layers. Our prices are structured for jewelry retailers seeking real margins on quality stones.

✦

Photo-Documented Inventory

Every parcel is photographed before shipping. You always know exactly what you're buying before you commit.

✦

Regular New Arrivals

Fresh parcels arrive continuously. Returning buyers get first notice of new stock before it's listed publicly.

How to Order

Simple. Direct. Transparent.

I

Browse & Inquire

Browse our catalog above and click "Quote" on any stone or parcel that interests you, or contact us directly with your requirements.

II

Receive Quote

We respond with pricing, available quantities, and additional photos within 24 hours. We can provide custom parcels to your specs.

III

Confirm & Pay

Confirm your order and arrange payment. We accept wire transfer and other secure methods. Stones are reserved on payment.

IV

Insured Shipping

Your stones are carefully packaged and shipped internationally with tracking. Delivery time varies by destination.

Get in Touch

Ready to Source Zambian Gemstones?

Send us a message with what you're looking for — stone type, quantity, budget — and we'll get back to you with availability and pricing within 24 hours.
